_doc: Canonical CATEGORY-NEUTRAL engine rules. The category-widening gate (tools/category-gate.mjs, docs/category-widening.md) requires every category fixture to cite rules from THIS catalog and a new category to reuse rules an existing seed already relies on — never a bespoke per-category code path. Each rule's `anchor` must resolve STRUCTURALLY: for a .mjs file the token must be a declared identifier (export/function/const/let/class NAME), for a .md file a heading containing the token — a comment or prose mention does NOT resolve. The gate fails if an anchor is dangling, so a rule cannot be invented as a bare string. Keys starting with `_` are metadata and ignored by the gate.

TRIAGE.desc: Research depth-dial from stakes / reversibility / commoditization (sets how hard Discern works).

SAFETY_OVERRIDE.desc: safety_relevant disables the brand-as-proxy shortcut and requires independent fundamentals.

R1.desc: Ranking invariant R1: fundamentals OUTRANK raw frequency (substance over visibility).

INDEPENDENCE.desc: Independence clustering collapses syndicated/affiliate listicles citing the same upstream to ONE signal.

PROVENANCE_CONFIDENCE.desc: Provenance->confidence calibration; affiliate/sponsored evidence down-weighted (never zeroed); counterevidence retained.

VALUE_FRAMEWORK.desc: Value-per-dollar / value-beyond-spec weighting (handmade-local up, unjustified markup down).

HARD_FILTER.desc: must_haves / dealbreakers / recipient hard filters disqualify candidates before ranking.

BENEFICIARY_SWITCH.desc: self/gift beneficiary toggles the active profile and the gift method branches (returnability, applies_to_gifts transfer).

OUTCOME_FAMILY.desc: Outcome engine: RECOMMEND / RECOMMEND_WITH_CAVEATS / INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE with a reason_code.
